title: Jennifer Rafauli
content:
Head of the MT Professional Journey Office
People.ContactEmail jrafauli@mccarthy.ca
- Osgoode Hall Law School
Jennifer is the inaugural Head of the McCarthy Tétrault’s Professional Journey Office and is based in our Toronto office.
The Professional Journey Office is a unique professional development program that integrates a focus on legal education, career development and legal service delivery to support our lawyers from their first day at the Firm up to and including their alumni experience.
Jennifer is a lawyer, talent development leader and executive coach with 20 years of experience in both the legal and finance industries. She has worked in talent development at top Canadian law firms and also led executive talent management and strategic client and business initiatives for the Capital Markets and Wealth Management businesses at a major Canadian financial institution.
Jennifer was called to the Ontario bar in 2003. She holds a Bachelor of Laws degree (LLB) from Osgoode Hall Law School (2002), a Bachelor of Arts degree (with High Distinction) from the University of Toronto (1999), and is a Certified Leadership Coach.
